---
title: "Agness Chisale"
subtitle: "Environmental Scientist | Geospatial Analyst"
toc: false
---

<!-- CONTACT BAR -->
<div class="contact-bar">
  <span><i class="fa-solid fa-location-dot"></i> Vancouver, BC</span>
  <a href="mailto:agnesschisale8@gmail.com"><i class="fa-solid fa-envelope"></i> agnesschisale8@gmail.com</a>
  <a href="https://github.com/AgnessChisale" target="_blank"><i class="fa-brands fa-github"></i> GitHub</a>
  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/agness-chisale-ab4199188/" target="_blank"><i class="fa-brands fa-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn</a>
</div>

<!-- ABOUT SECTION -->
<section id="about">
<div class="hero-section">
  <div class="hero-text">

## <i class="fa-solid fa-user"></i> About Me

I am a geospatial analyst and environmental scientist passionate about using spatial data, GIS and remote sensing to support environmental management and data-driven decision-making. I am currently pursuing a Master's degree in Geomatics for Environmental Management at the University of British Columbia. I also hold a Bachelor's degree in Environmental Science and Technology from the University of Malawi, earned with distinction. I am technically fluent in ArcGIS Pro, QGIS, PostgreSQL/PostGIS, Python and R.

  </div>
  <div class="hero-image">
    <div class="image-circle">
      ![](./images/Aggie.jpg)
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</section>

---

<!-- SKILLS SECTION -->
<section id="skills">

## <i class="fa-solid fa-screwdriver-wrench"></i> Skills

<div class="card-grid">

<div class="card">
<h3><i class="fa-solid fa-map"></i> GIS & Spatial Analysis</h3>
`ArcGIS Pro` `QGIS` `PostGIS` `PostgreSQL` `GDAL` `Kart` `Leaflet`
</div>

<div class="card">
<h3><i class="fa-solid fa-satellite"></i> Remote Sensing</h3>
`LiDAR` `ENVI` `Google Earth Engine` `PDAL` `lidR` `Hyperspectral Analysis`
</div>

<div class="card">
<h3><i class="fa-solid fa-code"></i> Programming</h3>
`Python` `R` `SQL` `ArcPy` `GeoPandas` `Rasterio` `ggplot2`
</div>

<div class="card">
<h3><i class="fa-solid fa-leaf"></i> Environmental Analysis</h3>
`Environmental Impact Assessment` `Habitat Modelling` `Riparian Management` `Field Data Collection`
</div>

</div>
</section>

---

<!-- PROJECTS SECTION -->
<section id="projects">

## <i class="fa-solid fa-folder-open"></i> Projects

<div class="card-grid">

<div class="card">
<h3>🗺️ GIS & Cartography</h3>
<p>Geocoding, feature digitization, old growth forest mapping, and cartographic modelling projects using ArcGIS Pro and QGIS.</p>
<a href="./projects.html#gis-cartography" class="see-more-btn">See Projects →</a>
</div>

<div class="card">
<h3>🌿 Ecological & Terrain Analysis</h3>
<p>Riparian management, salmon habitat modelling, least cost path analysis for wildlife corridors, and wildfire evacuation routing.</p>
<a href="./projects.html#ecological-terrain-analysis" class="see-more-btn">See Projects →</a>
</div>

<div class="card">
<h3>📡 Remote Sensing & LiDAR</h3>
<p>LiDAR data interpolation, hyperspectral analysis, object-based image classification, and Google Earth Engine workflows.</p>
<a href="./projects.html#remote-sensing-lidar" class="see-more-btn">See Projects →</a>
</div>

<div class="card">
<h3>🐍 Python & Geospatial Analysis</h3>
<p>Python scripting for spatial workflows using ArcPy, GeoPandas, Rasterio, and machine learning applied to geospatial data.</p>
<a href="./projects.html#python-geospatial-data-analysis" class="see-more-btn">See Projects →</a>
</div>

</div>
</section>

---

<!-- EXPERIENCE SECTION -->
<section id="experience">

## <i class="fa-solid fa-briefcase"></i> Experience

<div class="card-grid-stacked">

<div class="card">
<h3>Geospatial Analyst (Volunteer)</h3>
<h4>Tayo Climate Partners · 2025 – Present · Remote</h4>
<p>Supporting blue carbon and coastal restoration projects through spatial analysis and site suitability assessments.</p>
</div>

<div class="card">
<h3>Environmental Officer</h3>
<h4>Lilongwe City Council · July 2024 – May 2025 · Malawi</h4>
<p>Urban development compliance, environmental auditing, and stakeholder engagement across infrastructure projects.</p>
</div>

<div class="card">
<h3>Environmental Consultant</h3>
<h4>Water, Waste and Environmental Consultants · 2022 – 2024 · Malawi</h4>
<p>Environmental and social impact assessment across energy and infrastructure projects.</p>
</div>

</div>

<a href="./experience.html" class="see-more-btn" style="margin-top: 1rem; display: inline-block;">See Full Experience →</a>

</section>

---

<!-- EDUCATION SECTION -->
<section id="education">

## <i class="fa-solid fa-graduation-cap"></i> Education

<div class="card-grid-stacked">

<div class="card">
<h3>University of British Columbia</h3>
<h4>Master of Geomatics for Environmental Management · 2025 – 2026</h4>
</div>

<div class="card">
<h3>University of Malawi</h3>
<h4>BSc Environmental Science and Technology · 2018 – 2022</h4>
<p>Graduated with Distinction ⭐</p>
</div>

</div>

<a href="./education.html" class="see-more-btn" style="margin-top: 1rem; display: inline-block;">See Full Education →</a>

</section>

---

<!-- LEADERSHIP SECTION -->
<section id="leadership">

## <i class="fa-solid fa-award"></i> Leadership & Certifications

<div class="card-grid-stacked">

<div class="card">
<h3>🏅 Mastercard Foundation Graduate Scholar at UBC, 2025</h3>
</div>
<div class="card">
<h3>🏅 Finalist, YALI RLC-SA Innovation Challenge, 2024</h3>
</div>
<div class="card">
<h3>🏅 African Drone and Data Academy — Certificate in Drone & Data Technology, 2023</h3>
</div>
<div class="card">
<h3>🏅 Dean's List Award, University of Malawi, 2022</h3>
</div>

</div>

<a href="./leadership_and_training.html" class="see-more-btn" style="margin-top: 1rem; display: inline-block;">See All Awards & Training →</a>

</section>
